---
title: "Ammonyte Tutorials"
---

Welcome to the Ammonyte tutorials. Ammonyte is a Python package for detecting abrupt transitions and tipping points in paleoclimate time series.

## Tutorials

- [Getting Started](Getting_Started.ipynb) — Load a time series and create your first visualization
- [KS Test](KS_test.ipynb) — Detect transitions using the augmented Kolmogorov-Smirnov test
- [LERM](LERM_validation.ipynb) — Detect transitions using Laplacian Eigenmaps of Recurrence Matrices
- [Ruptures](Rupture_Validation.ipynb) — Detect transitions using change-point detection algorithms
